name: sample-emotions
description: Hand-curated micro-fixture for the eval harness. Three codes over one short interview snippet. Gold spans are author-curated (not model output). Deliberately tiny so the scoring pipeline is exercised end-to-end without depending on dataset size; real fixtures should be larger and provenance-documented.
transcriptContent: I felt really anxious before the exam, my heart was racing. My friends helped me study, which made a difference. Afterwards I tried to stay calm and take deep breaths to cope.

goldCodings.codedText: I felt really anxious before the exam, my heart was racing
My friends helped me study, which made a difference
I tried to stay calm and take deep breaths to cope
